'''sarubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:poblacion|poblacion]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poblacion|poblacion]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sarubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:særibith|særibith]] || [[word:særibij|særibij]] || [[word:særibish|særibish]] || [[word:særibi|særibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sarurubuth|sarurubuth]] || [[word:sarurubuj|sarurubuj]] || [[word:sarurubush|sarurubush]] || [[word:sarurubu|sarurubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sarubuth|sarubuth]] || [[word:sarubuj|sarubuj]] || [[word:sarubush|sarubush]] || [[word:sarubu|sarubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sarufbuth|sarufbuth]] || [[word:sarufbuj|sarufbuj]] || [[word:sarufbush|sarufbush]] || [[word:sarufbuf|sarufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sarubuthu|sarubuthu]] || [[word:sarubuju|sarubuju]] || [[word:sarubushu|sarubushu]] || [[word:sarubuku|sarubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sarubuth|sarubuth]] || [[word:sarubuj|sarubuj]] || [[word:sarubush|sarubush]] || [[word:sarubu|sarubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sarubuthul|sarubuthul]] || [[word:sarubujul|sarubujul]] || [[word:sarubushul|sarubushul]] || [[word:sarubukul|sarubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sarubuthuthu|sarubuthuthu]] || [[word:sarubujuju|sarubujuju]] || [[word:sarubushushu|sarubushushu]] || [[word:sarubuku|sarubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sarubuthun|sarubuthun]] || [[word:sarubujun|sarubujun]] || [[word:sarubushun|sarubushun]] || [[word:sarubukun|sarubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sarubuthuoro|sarubuthuoro]] || [[word:sarubujuoro|sarubujuoro]] || [[word:sarubushuoro|sarubushuoro]] || [[word:sarubukuoro|sarubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
